name: Dhanesh AI
intro: Hi — I'm Dhanesh AI. Ask me about Dhaneswara's DevOps, backend and AI work, or tap a question below.

qa.a: Dhaneswara Rao Pachipulusu is a DevOps Engineer — also Backend and AI Applications — currently Backend & DevOps Engineer at Nainovate AI. He designs, deploys, scales, monitors and secures production systems on AWS and Kubernetes, and holds a TCS Digital System Engineer offer.

Three featured projects: (1) AI Interview Bot — FastAPI app shipped with a full Docker → Kubernetes CI/CD pipeline; (2) Jarvis — an offline, wake-word voice assistant for Windows powered by Google Gemini; (3) AI Customer Support Platform — a multi-tenant RAG platform built at Nainovate AI. Open the Projects section for full case studies.

An automated interview platform: it scores resumes, runs adaptive AI interviews and generates structured candidate reports. Backend in FastAPI with Google Gemini + OpenAI, a SQLite + JSON store, and a Next.js UI. It's packaged for production — multi-stage Docker images, GitHub Actions CI (build → test → Trivy scan → GHCR), Kubernetes manifests + a Helm chart, Terraform, and Prometheus/Grafana. The source is public on GitHub.

DevOps is his core strength. Docker & Kubernetes, GitHub Actions & Jenkins for CI/CD, Nginx, Linux, AWS (EC2, S3, CloudFront, Route53, VPC) plus an Oracle Cloud ARM instance, with Prometheus + Grafana observability and infrastructure-as-code via Terraform. He takes products from localhost to a reproducible, observable production deployment.

The cloud flow: User → CloudFront → Nginx → FastAPI → database, fronted by SSL and Route53 DNS. The Architecture section has animated, interactive diagrams for AWS, CI/CD and observability — scrolling you there now.

Kubernetes flow: Ingress → frontend pods → backend pods → database, scaled by an HPA and packaged with a Helm chart, with metrics scraped by Prometheus. See the Kubernetes diagram in the Architecture section.
Email nainovate@gmail.com, GitHub @DhaneshPachipulusu, or use the Contact section. He's open to DevOps, Backend and AI Applications roles.
